data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"8.2 PRE-EXISTING CONDITION LIMITATION: None. Group coverage has no pre-existing condition exclusions."
<hyperedge>"Section 1 - About This Certificate: This certificate is evidence of coverage under the Master Group Policy issued to your employer."
<hyperedge>"Voluntary coverage requires enrollment within 31 days."
<hyperedge>"Employer (Policyholder): TechCorp Industries, Inc., Corporate Headquarters: San Jose, California."
<hyperedge>"10.4 Benefits will be paid within 10 business days of receipt of complete claim documentation."
<hyperedge>"Voluntary coverage required enrollment within 31 days of hire (Late Entrant provisions apply if enrolling after 31 days)."
<hyperedge>"The conversion policy will be issued at: • Your attained age at conversion • Standard premium rates for the individual policy • Maximum amount: Lesser of group coverage or $200,000."
<hyperedge>"Vice President, Group Operations"
<hyperedge>"The certificate is issued by Alliance Group Benefits."
<hyperedge>"If you are diagnosed with a terminal illness with life expectancy of 12 months or less, you may request acceleration of up to 75% of your death benefit."
<hyperedge>"Basic Life Insurance: 2x Annual Salary = $180,000, Voluntary Additional Coverage: $100,000 (employee-elected), Total Coverage: $280,000."
<hyperedge>"The basic benefit is 2 times the annual base salary."
<hyperedge>"9.1 You may change your beneficiary at any time by submitting a change form to your employer's HR department."

<hyperedge>"Section 2 - Eligibility and Effective Date: You became eligible for coverage on your date of hire. Basic coverage became effective automatically without requiring evidence of insurability."
<hyperedge>"Late entrants are subject to special provisions."
<hyperedge>"Any amount accelerated reduces the death benefit payable to beneficiaries."
<hyperedge>"11.1 If you become totally disabled before age 60 and remain disabled for 6 consecutive months, your voluntary life insurance premiums will be waived."
<hyperedge>"Basic benefit equals 2 times your annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000."
<hyperedge>"Ported coverage continues at the same amount you had under the group policy."
<hyperedge>"Issued: June 1, 2024"
<hyperedge>"The employer is TechCorp Industries, Inc."
<hyperedge>"The benefit is rounded to the next higher $1,000."
<hyperedge>"Your basic benefit equals 2 times your annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000."

<hyperedge>"Your coverage terminates on the earliest of: (a) The date the Master Policy terminates (b) The last day of the month in which you cease to be an eligible employee (c) The date you cease active full-time employment (d) The date you request termination of voluntary coverage (e) The last day for which required premiums have been paid."
<hyperedge>"9.2 If no beneficiary survives you, benefits will be paid to your estate."
<hyperedge>"Section 3 - Benefit Amount Calculation: Basic Life: Your basic benefit equals 2 times your annual base salary, rounded to the next higher $1,000."
<hyperedge>"The total coverage is $280,000."
<hyperedge>"If you leave employment, you may port your coverage by continuing it as an individual policy."
<hyperedge>"11.2 Coverage continues without premium payment during disability."
<hyperedge>"You may elect additional coverage in increments."
<hyperedge>"Evidence of insurability is NOT required for portability."
<hyperedge>"The coverage amount is $280,000."
<hyperedge>"You must apply within 31 days of termination of employment."
<hyperedge>"Minimum acceleration: $5,000 Maximum acceleration: $250,000."
<hyperedge>"The employee may elect additional coverage in increments."
<hyperedge>"9.3 If you name multiple beneficiaries, benefits are divided equally unless you specify percentages."
<hyperedge>"Voluntary Supplemental: You may elect additional coverage in increments."
<hyperedge>"The primary beneficiary is Jordan Casey Taylor."
<hyperedge>"The effective date is June 1, 2024."
<hyperedge>"11.3 You must provide proof of continuing disability annually."
<hyperedge>"$5,000 Maximum acceleration: $250,000"
<hyperedge>"Group Term Life Insurance Certificate issued by Alliance Group Benefits."
<hyperedge>"The employee is Alex Morgan Taylor."
<hyperedge>"You must apply for conversion within 31 days of termination."
<hyperedge>"You may elect additional coverage in increments of $10,000, up to a maximum of 5 times salary."
<hyperedge>"Effective Date: June 1, 2024, Premium Contribution: Employer pays basic; employee pays $12/month for voluntary coverage."
<hyperedge>"The certificate is valid under the Master Policy."
<hyperedge>"Total coverage cannot exceed $1,000,000."

<hyperedge>"The Master Policy controls in case of any conflict with this certificate."
<hyperedge>"The employee pays $12/month for voluntary coverage."
<hyperedge>"11.4 Waiver ends when you return to work, recover, or reach age 65."
<hyperedge>"Accelerated amount will be reduced by an actuarial discount."

<hyperedge>"10.2 Required documents: • Completed claim form (available from employer or insurer) • Certified death certificate • Proof of beneficiary identity"
<hyperedge>"Your coverage is subject to the terms, conditions, and exclusions in the Master Policy and this certificate."
<hyperedge>"Premium rates will be age-banded group rates, payable directly to the insurance company."

<hyperedge>"The primary beneficiary is Jordan Casey Taylor, spouse of the insured."
<hyperedge>"No medical exam or health questions required for conversion."

<hyperedge>"The Master Policy governs any conflicts with this certificate."
<hyperedge>"8.1 SUICIDE: If death occurs by suicide within 12 months of the coverage effective date, we will not pay a death benefit."
<hyperedge>"If your group coverage terminates for any reason except non-payment of premium, you may convert to an individual whole life policy without evidence of insurability."
<hyperedge>"7.3 Accelerated amount will be reduced by an actuarial discount."
<hyperedge>"Basic coverage is effective without evidence of insurability."
<hyperedge>"10.3 Submit claims to: Alliance Group Benefits - Claims Department 1200 Insurance Plaza, Dallas, TX 75201 Claims Hotline: 1-888-555-CLAIM"

<hyperedge>"The employee pays $12 per month for voluntary coverage."
<hyperedge>"Your basic benefit will be recalculated annually on your policy anniversary based on your current salary."
